name: Brainrot Battles
description: Pokemon-style turn-based combat with Italian Brainrot characters. Draft a team of 3, then battle until one team faints!
rules:
OVERVIEW
Two players draft three brainrots each, then battle until one team has no conscious member.

PHASES
Draft: each player privately picks one unpicked brainrot at a time until they have 3. Roster entries show HP, attack damage ranges, and any healing.
Battle: one active brainrot per team. The current player either attacks with attackIdx 0-3 or, after a faint, switches to a living bench brainrot by team index.

VIEW
agentView shows roster/attacks during draft and both teams, active members, HP, switch needs, and last attack during battle. draftCounts are public; opponent picks are hidden until battle.

WIN
A player wins when every opposing brainrot has 0 HP.
